Ladder 49 (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $74,541,707Details
International Box Office $27,791,141
Worldwide Box Office $102,332,848
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,088,204 (29.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.37 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:72.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,260 opening theaters/3,261 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $135,789,431

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 1st, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: January 7th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: March 8th, 2005 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense fire and rescue situations, and for language
Running Time: 114 minutes
Plot point: Firefighter, Non-Chronological
Subgenre: Survival Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
